race.comment: UNITED LEGEND (2) has found form and was far from disgraced last start when working home nicely into third over 1950m at Morphettville Parks. That followed a win at Murray Bridge the start prior. Better suited over this sort of trip and should be fighting out the finish. THEODOR (1) returned to winning form last start, scoring with a fair bit in hand over this track and trip after getting it his own way in front. Is unbeaten in two starts at this course and distance, so has to be taken very seriously. WHATSANAMEGEORGE (4) is yet to threaten in his two runs back but is tackling more suitable company back in grade third-up. Gets a key switch in Mines and will relish the added trip. THE TRUE BELIEVER (3) was far from his best last time when always well back but his two runs prior measure right up for this. Gets in well with the 3kg claim and has to be kept safe.
